items.title: Exploratory visualization
items.description: Project high-dimensional tabular or sensor data to 2–3 PCA components for scatter plots that reveal clusters, outliers, and variance-driven structure before labeling.

items.title: Feature compression for modeling
items.description: Replace p raw features with k ≪ p components to speed up training, reduce storage, and mitigate multicollinearity in linear or distance-based models.

items.title: Noise reduction and denoising
items.description: Reconstruct data from the top k components to filter high-variance signal from trailing noise dimensions—common in signal processing and image patches.

items.title: Preprocessing for clustering
items.description: Run k-means or hierarchical clustering on PCA scores instead of raw high-dimensional features so distance geometry is less dominated by irrelevant axes.

items.title: Anomaly detection baselines
items.description: Flag points with large reconstruction error after projecting to k components—unusual samples fail to reconstruct well in the leading variance subspace.
